message.content:
@startuml
title Initialization

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EDEDED
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #666666
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
}

box "service process" #A9D7E6
participant "ConcreteImpl" as CI #F6E2B8
participant "DBusAdapter" as DA #9BFF8F
end box

participant "DBus" as BUS #E6E6F2

box "client process" #E6E6FA
participant "DBusProxy" as DP #9BFF8F
end box

DA -> DA : Init(ConcreteImpl)
DA -> BUS : Export

DP -> DP : Init
DP -> BUS : ConnectToRemoteObject
note right of DP
Tries to fetch all properties
including "ready" property
end note

DP -> BUS : GetAllProperties
BUS -> DA : GetAllProperties
DA --> BUS : return properties
BUS --> DP : return properties

@enduml
